channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 52 but Curry and Wiggins lead balanced Warriors past Thunder 116-109
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry hit a long 3-pointer with 1:52 left on the way to 21 points, Andrew Wiggins scored 27 and the Golden State Warriors beat the Western Conference-leading Oklahoma City Thunder 116-109 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nikola Jokic says the surging New York Knicks are a 'top-5 candidate' to win the NBA title
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two years after he won an NBA title, Nikola Jokic views the surging New York Knicks as a “top-five candidate” to end their 52-year championship drought. The Knicks beat Jokic's Denver Nuggets 122-112 on Wednesday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens fans urged to donate for Kincaid after Bills fan organized effort for Andrews
item.description: Baltimore Ravens fans are being urged to donate to a group supported by Buffalo Bills tight end Dalton Kincaid, who had a pass go through his arms late in last weekend's playoff loss to the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Courtney Vandersloot to sign with Chicago Sky, returning to franchise that drafted her
item.description: Free agent guard Courtney Vandersloot is headed back to Chicago, her agent confirmed to The Associated Press on Wednesday. The veteran guard will sign with the team that drafted her in 2011 after spending the last two seasons in New York, agent Lindsay Kagawa Colas said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson to have season-ending shoulder surgery on torn labrum
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta forward Jalen Johnson plans to have shoulder surgery and miss the remainder of the season, a major blow to the struggling Hawks ’ efforts to remain in the Eastern Conference playoff race.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wife of Chiefs owner dismisses 'referee favoritism' ahead of Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Tavia Hunt, the wife of Kansas City Chiefs owner Clark Hunt, doesn't want to hear about "referee favoritism" as she wrote a congratulatory post for her team reaching another Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WWE is 'driving pop culture,' pro wrestling legend Paul Heyman says
item.description: WWE Hall of Famer Paul Heyman said in an interview published Tuesday that the company is "driving pop culture" right now and is no longer on the fringes of sports and entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fruita boys win 2OT thriller at Montrose for first place in SWL, as Fruita girls dominate Red Hawks
item.description: One of the most highly anticipated games of the season, Montrose vs. Fruita, a battle of the top two teams in the Southwestern league, exceeded expectations.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Person seen firing gun into air amid crowd of Philadelphia Eagles fans; police investigating
item.description: Video of the alleged incident, shared to X late on Sunday, appeared to show a large crowd celebrating the Eagles' win when a person raised the gun into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
